description_long: This is a tall, ornately carved wooden cabinet or shelf, featuring a decorative crown with intricate patterns at the top. The front face is framed by two elaborately detailed columns, and the structure is supported by four short, rounded legs. The cabinet has three open rectangular shelves, with no visible doors or drawers, making the interior easily accessible. The lower edge is adorned with a small, decorative lattice, adding to its traditional aesthetic. The rich, dark brown finish suggests it is made primarily of wood, and its design is reminiscent of classic or antique furniture often found in urban heritage neighborhoods or as a statement piece in public spaces.
description: A tall, ornately carved wooden cabinet or shelf with open shelving and decorative columns, finished in dark brown. It features a traditional crown and latticework at the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate crown, detailed columns, three open shelves, and decorative lattice at the base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's slim profile and the depth of the decorative crown and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, unadorned back panel and the silhouette of the shelves and crown.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the slim profile and depth of the crown and legs.
